case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. HERMAN JOSEPH AUTRY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AUTRY, HERMAN JOSEPH AN INDIVIDUAL DBA A-1 PROFESSIONAL AUTO DETAIL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
